XF-Used-Api-Version.description: The API version used to render the response.

XF-Request-User.description: The user ID of the request user.

XF-Request-User-Extras.description: Additional information about the request user in JSON encoding. Requires XF-Request-User header to be non-zero.

schema.description: The binary data is output directly, not JSON.
